title: TelemetryFrontendAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by the chain query-telemetry-substrate-frontend QF5 retrospective to record that the dashboard surfaces serving the read-side telemetry substrate (per-query trajectory inspector, analytics page over the three query_* projections, training-pair browser) have been verified against the chain's design doc and completion criteria. Self-hosting check parallel to SubstrateFrontendAuditCompleted — the read-side frontend uses the write-side audit ledger to record its own audit outcome, closing the substrate trilogy loop (query-telemetry-substrate → query-telemetry-substrate-frontend → SubstrateFrontendAuditCompleted-style closure). Findings are keyed to docs/TELEMETRY_FRONTEND.md sections. See docs/TELEMETRY_FRONTEND.md and the chain's completion_condition for context.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the design / contract doc the findings are keyed against — typically docs/TELEMETRY_FRONTEND.md plus the chain's completion criteria.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome covering all completion-criterion sub-items (a)–(f).

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the follow-on work (typically: cross-encoder reranker fine-tune from local-ml-roadmap.md §1.1; SSE invalidation for the analytics page once grounding_event_recorded ships; entity-detail integration once agent-substrate-frontend F3 stabilizes). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per design-doc section or completion-criterion item. status uses the same enum as the architecture audit (pass / fail / partial / deferred).

item.description: Design-doc section identifier and short description (e.g. "§3.1 trajectory endpoint").

status.description: pass = contract honored end-to-end; fail = gap (must file follow-on); partial = honored with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope per chain non-goals.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence: test names, file paths, screenshots, commit SHA, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
